summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Acorn platform after UI overhaul to Corporate Professional (Navy & Gold) theme and API routing fixes. All 15 backend tests passed (100%), including the previously failing PUT /api/projects/{id}/ and POST /api/projects/{id}/requirements/ endpoints. Frontend UI theme is consistent across all phase pages with proper Navy & Gold styling.
passed_tests: User login with valid credentials - 200 OK
User login with invalid credentials - 401/404 rejection
GET /api/projects/{id}/ - Get project by ID working
PUT /api/projects/{id}/ - Project update WITH trailing slash - FIXED
PUT /api/projects/{id} - Project update WITHOUT trailing slash - FIXED

ui_verification.landing_page: Navy & Gold theme with proper styling, gold 'Start Free Trial' button
ui_verification.login_page: Split-screen design with dark navy background, gold 'Sign In' button
ui_verification.projects_page: Dark theme with gold accents, project cards styled correctly
ui_verification.phase_header_card: Gold accent bar, gold phase number badge, proper Navy background (#111b2e)
ui_verification.phase_navigation_sidebar: Dark navy background (#0d1525), gold active state on selected phase
ui_verification.ai_assistant_card: Dark navy background with gold 'Generate with AI' button
ui_verification.feasibility_study_phase: Feasibility Score card with proper Navy & Gold theme
ui_verification.requirements_gathering_phase: Requirements form with dark inputs and gold buttons
ui_verification.design_phase: AI Design Assistant with diagram type buttons properly styled

critical_code_review_comments: All API routing fixes verified - PUT and POST endpoints now support both trailing slash and non-trailing slash URLs
UI theme consistency is excellent across all phase pages
data-testid attributes properly implemented for phase-header, ai-assistant-card, next-phase-banner, and phase navigation
seed_data_creation: Test requirements and tasks created during API testing
mocked_api_note: AI content generation uses MOCK responses when no real LLM API key is configured
context_for_next_testing_agent: All API endpoints working correctly. UI theme overhaul to Navy & Gold is complete and consistent. Phase navigation works across all phases (planning, feasibility_study, requirements_gathering, design, etc.). The PUT and POST routing issues from iteration_1 have been fixed.
